description: @deprecated tag left on a method in production code instead of removing or isolating in a shim
input:
class Account < ApplicationRecord
  # @deprecated Use #terminate instead
  def close!
    update!(state: :closed)
  end

  # @deprecated Prefer Account::Billable#cancel_subscription
  def cancel!
    subscription.cancel!
  end

  def terminate
    purge_or_incinerate if terminable?
  end
end
